default: Gitember is a free, open-source Git GUI client that turns the complexity of Git into a clean, visual experience. Whether you just started using Git or you're managing a large team repository, Gitember gives you a full-featured environment for everything from daily commits to deep code archaeology. Gitember has integration with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket and Gitea. Advanced fulltext search across project history, folders and files difference tool.
en-us: Gitember is a free, open-source Git GUI client that turns the complexity of Git into a clean, visual experience. Whether you just started using Git or you're managing a large team repository, Gitember gives you a full-featured environment for everything from daily commits to deep code archaeology. Gitember has integration with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket and Gitea. Advanced fulltext search across project history, folders and files difference tool.
